flaws.title: Scalar forward pass — no SIMD
flaws.description: forward_pass_with_storage() uses scalar iteration through layers with .clone() per layer. src/training/mod.rs lines 496-521 uses nested scalar for loops for weight multiplication. No ndarray, no SIMD intrinsics.

flaws.title: Fixed topology enum — no runtime synthesis
flaws.description: TopologyType has 6 hardcoded variants (Mesh, Hierarchical, Clustered, Pipeline, Star, Custom). Custom variant is an escape hatch with zero generative capability. No Pareto-optimal graph synthesis anywhere.

flaws.title: NPM-tethered WASM — no wasm32-wasi
flaws.description: Requires Node.js fs, path, pathToFileURL. All WASM deployment routes through npm install ruv-swarm-wasm. Target is wasm32-unknown-unknown via wasm-pack, not wasm32-wasi.

flaws.title: No memory zeroing on dissolution
flaws.description: SharedMemory<T>::drop() calls alloc::dealloc but does NOT zero memory. No zeroize crate anywhere. cuda-wasm/tests/cuda_fidelity/memory_tests_extended.rs line 412: test only checks dropping does not panic.

flaws.title: Unsound transmute_copy in GPU path
flaws.description: unsafe { std::mem::transmute_copy(&x) } for arbitrary T — unsound for any T not layout-compatible with f32.

flaws.title: Zero post-quantum cryptography
flaws.description: No imports of pqcrypto-kyber, pqcrypto-dilithium, or any PQ library in any Cargo.toml across the entire repo.

flaws.title: Anthropic-only vendor lock
flaws.description: Hardcoded Anthropic model strings with zero failover routing.

flaws.title: Static .roomodes JSON — no dynamic synthesis
flaws.description: No dynamic mode synthesis, no DAG execution.

flaws.title: Single-tenant architecture
flaws.description: No namespace isolation, no multi-tenant fabric.

flaws.title: Round-robin centrifugal dispatch
flaws.description: Standard load balancing with no thermal gradient awareness, no vortex routing.
